headline: Ether Whales Move 37,806 ETH Ahead of $1.5K Test

article.title: Old Ether wallets move 37,806 ETH as whale conviction faces key test at $1.5K
article.summary: Old Ether wallets moved 37,806 ETH as long-term whale profitability turned negative for the first time since 2019, signaling mixed sentiment among large holders.

headline: Spain: 100 Crypto Firms Face MiCA Deadline

article.title: Spain regulator rules out extension for non-MiCA compliant crypto companies
article.summary: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.

headline: Philippines Boosts Budget 6% for 2024 Fiscal Year

article.title: Philippine Government Plans to Raise Budget by 6% Next Year
article.summary: The Philippines plans to increase the budget by 6% next year to 7.2 trillion pesos ($117 billion), according to the budget department.

headline: Bolivia Ditches 15-Year Currency Peg, Adopts Float

article.title: Bolivia Moves to Flexible Exchange-Rate System After 15 Years
article.summary: Bolivia is moving to a flexible exchange-rate system to strengthen macroeconomic stability, its Finance Ministry announced Friday.
